The query groups by semester_type and course_type, calculates average grades and counts, and orders deterministically by semester and course type.","sql":"SELECT 
  cs.semester_type,
  c.course_type,
  ROUND(AVG((g.grade_value::text)::NUMERIC), 2) AS avg_grade,
  COUNT(g.id) AS grade_count
FROM grades g
JOIN enrollments e ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
JOIN course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
WHERE g.grade_value IS NOT NULL

visualization.title: Average Grades by Course Type: Winter vs Summer Semesters

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  cs.semester_type,
  c.course_type,
  ROUND(AVG((g.grade_value::text)::NUMERIC), 2) AS avg_grade,
  COUNT(g.id) AS grade_count
FROM grades g
JOIN enrollments e ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
JOIN course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
WHERE g.grade_value IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY cs.semester_type, c.course_type
ORDER BY cs.semester_type, c.course_type

visualization.title: Average Grades by Course Type: Winter vs Summer Semesters

result.sql:
SELECT 
  cs.semester_type,
  c.course_type,
  ROUND(AVG((g.grade_value::text)::NUMERIC), 2) AS avg_grade,
  COUNT(g.id) AS grade_count
FROM grades g
JOIN enrollments e ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
JOIN course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
WHERE g.grade_value IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY cs.semester_type, c.course_type
ORDER BY cs.semester_type, c.course_type
